page.title: Forecasting
page.subtitle: Generate, track, and review forecasts for your products.

table.uploadHint: Upload fresh sales data for this product, then generate the forecast again.

messages.watchNotice: Training is still running for {{count}} product(s). You can stay on this page or go to the dashboard and get notified when it finishes.
messages.watchSaved: We’ll notify you in the bell when these forecasts are ready.
messages.forecastNotFound: No forecast is available for this product yet. Generate a forecast first.
messages.noDataDetected: No usable sales data was found for this product. Upload new data, then generate the forecast again.

details.pageSubtitle: Review the forecast, charts, and summary for this product.
details.chartWarning: Forecast values are estimates based on the available sales history. Use them as planning guidance, not as guaranteed demand.
details.notReadyMessage: This forecast is not ready yet. Start it from here and come back once training finishes.
details.trainingMessage: This forecast is currently training. The page will keep checking automatically.
details.failedMessage: This forecast failed previously. You can retry it from here.
details.dailySubtitle: Interactive quantity trend with confidence band, zoom, and a peak-day marker.
details.weeklySubtitle: Weekly quantity and revenue trend for the selected range.
details.selectionEmpty: No forecast points are available in the selected date range.
details.explanationFallback: From {{start}} to {{end}}, this forecast expects about {{quantity}} units in total, averaging {{avg}} per day and generating around {{revenue}}. The strongest demand inside this selected window is expected on {{peakDate}}.

aiExplanation.title: AI Explanation
aiExplanation.requestOnly: AI explanation is generated only when requested.
aiExplanation.stale: This explanation is older than the current forecast. Re-explain to refresh it.

page.title: How to use Forecasting

readiness.title: 1. Check product readiness
readiness.description: Each product has a forecast status. Not Generated means no forecast exists yet, Training means AIMOPS is generating it, Ready means you can view the forecast, and Failed means you can retry.

generate.title: 2. Generate forecasts
generate.description: Click Generate for a product when it has enough sales history. AIMOPS uses uploaded sales data to estimate future demand.

upload.title: 3. Upload data when needed
upload.description: If a product has no sales history or not enough usable data, upload sales data first before generating a forecast.

training.title: 4. Wait while training finishes
training.description: Training can take a little time. You can stay on this page, or go back to the dashboard and AIMOPS will notify you when watched forecasts are ready.

ready.title: 5. Open ready forecasts
ready.description: When a forecast is Ready, click View to open the forecast details page with charts, summary numbers, confidence, and AI explanation.

retry.title: 6. Retry failed forecasts
retry.description: If a forecast fails, check the error message. Retry after uploading better data or after fixing the product sales history.

page.note: Tip: Forecast quality depends on clean product names and enough sales history. Merge duplicate products before forecasting when needed.
